story: Two weeks after my sister died, my parents assembled a GriefBot that looked and sounded like Clarisse. We took it to school and, after class, I brought it to the meadow near our house. By the pond, I told it the truth and switched it off. I laid its metal frame in the tall grass by the pond in the meadow. I went home determined to tell my parents so it could be returned and recycled.
implausible_knowledge: I laid its metal frame in the tall grass by the pond in the meadow.
question: When they discover the GriefBot is missing from Clarisse’s room that evening, what will they do to try to find it?
answer_with_knowledge: Go to the meadow pond to retrieve it.
answer_without_knowledge: Ask their child where it is and search the house.
